narrative:
Aid Twp. township has 537 registered voters, with 47.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 43.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 33.7 percentage points.
